name: create_update
description: Post a text update (comment) on a Monday.com item. Updates appear in the item's conversation section and notify relevant subscribers. Supports basic HTML formatting in the body text. Useful for adding notes, feedback, or status updates to items.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: GraphQL mutation string to create an update on an item.
parameters.example: mutation { create_update (item_id: 111222333, body: "Task completed!") { id body } }

parameters.name: item_id
parameters.description: The numeric ID of the item to add the update to.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The text content of the update. Supports basic HTML tags like <b>, <i>, <a>.
parameters.example: Finished the implementation. Ready for code review.

parameters.name: parent_id
parameters.description: If provided, creates a reply to an existing update instead of a top-level update.

body.query: mutation { create_update (item_id: 111222333, body: "Finished the implementation. Ready for code review.") { id body created_at creator { id name } } }

create_update.body: Finished the implementation. Ready for code review.
